name: Cowing Park
description: Cowing Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Muncie, IN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
hours: 7 a.m. to 3 p.m. (Closed for lunch 11 a.m. - 12 p.m.)

name: First Serve Muncie
description: Come play pickleball at First Serve Muncie in Muncie, IN! There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and trainers or lessons.

name: Halteman Park
description: Halteman Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Muncie, IN. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Morrow's Meadow Park
description: Come play pickleball at Morrow's Meadow Park in Yorktown, IN! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: PickleHouse
description: PickleHouse is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Muncie, IN. There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights, restrooms, water, and youth programming. Reservations are available.

name: Riverview Park
description: Come play pickleball at Riverview Park in Muncie, IN! There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Storer Estates
description: Storer Estates is a place to play pickleball in Muncie, IN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.
